text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: I underestimated how much work<n>being your partner would be. Just<n>look at all this attention I'm drawing.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Hehe, I think you understood it well<n>enough. You saw that the appeal of<n>my offer was bigger than the risks<n>involved.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: I promise to fulfill my end of the deal.<n>And these lessons until the Droit<n>won't interfere with your training, so<n>you can rest assured.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Now then! We've shown each other<n>our costumes, so let's see how we<n>feel in them and practice our dancing.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: First, we'll start by accustoming<n>ourselves to the partner dance.<n>Normal classroom lessons only focus<n>on winning concert performances.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: But what's different from regular<n>dancing is, of course, that we'll be<n>doing it with a partner. There's<n>something especially important about<n>that... Do you know what it is?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Umm... Making sure not to step on<n>each other's tails?

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Heh, well, you're not wrong! More<n>specifically, we have to learn to<n>breathe in time with one another.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: For now, that's all you need to worry<n>about. I'll take the lead. I have a<n>routine in mind too—ready to try?

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: One, two, three, four... One, two, three,<n>four...

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Here, can you lean on me a little<n>more? That's it... Just trust me.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Come now, Sky.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: That was excellent! I knew you'd be<n>a fast learner. What else... I think<n>you'll be able to move more easily<n>once you trust me more.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Are we doing this choreographyduring the real thing? The dance andthe song are just so classical.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: What we'll be doing is the exhibition.<n>Our job is to create a fun atmosphere<n>before everyone else starts dancing.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Normally the dorm leaders show an<n>example for everyone to follow... A<n>glamorous waltz always gets<n>everybody in a cheerful mood.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Ohh, so that's why.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Hm?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Uh! Nothin'...

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Sky, come on, we need to be in sync.<n>Want to try finishing your thought?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Really, it's nothing important. Just,<n>you know... it feels kinda ordinary...

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Go on.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: It's definitely got a vibrant party feel,<n>and it's a perfect way to highlight<n>you.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: But... well, I don't know anything<n>about the Droit. It's probably better to<n>just do it how you want.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: ...All right. What can we do to make it<n>more interesting?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Huh? Ohh, I'm not the expert here.<n>What would I know?

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Maybe put in a lift? I could try holding<n>you up and turning.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Yeah, that really feels like you, I<n>guess. But maybe we don't need to<n>worry about making it interesting.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Then what if we did a turn and reallynailed it? Turning speed,angle—perfectly in tune.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Um... Actually, what if we don'tmatch each other?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Like this—we could start off doing<n>completely different movements,<n>throwing the audience for a loop, then<n>click together at just the right<n>moment... or something.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: There's no way we'll be perfectly in<n>sync with the time we have left, so<n>might as well show 'em a little<n>surprise instead, you know?

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Ah... That's it!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Uh... Well, I mean, easier said than<n>done, right? Now that we've tried a<n>little, I can tell my movements really<n>aren't up to par.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: And the whole trusting you part... I<n>haven't gotten the hang of that either.<n>Better to not try anything crazy. We<n>should just focus on the basics and—

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Knock, knock...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Huh? ...Ack!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Ohhh, is that from Spe and the others?<n>This is great.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Ugh... Was this your idea? I knew I<n>wouldn't be able to hide being in the<n>Droit, but still...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: People are getting way too excited, ormad for some reason, or giving mewrestling masks? Not to mention...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: So your plan was to get everyone<n>excited to see me and cut off my<n>retreat, huh?

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: There's no plan! It's all becauseyou're so popular. And how wouldI know the key to motivating youwas your friends?

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Haha. So, is everyone coming to the<n>Droit?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Sorry to say, but yep, they're all<n>comin'... Can't believe I invited all my<n>classmates. This isn't some festival.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: So they're coming... That's great.
